w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Completed the remaining coverage of Module 4: Inheritance and Polymorphism in OOP.
Demonstrated creating base and derived classes using extends and super, including constructor chaining.
Covered method overriding and polymorphism through common interfaces/behaviors
Administered a short quiz and conducted guided recitation to check mastery of Module 4 concepts.
polymorphism, and hierarchy analysis were delivered; additional time was used to address misconceptions on prototype vs class syntax, but coverage was completed.)
Prepared and administered the Final Examination covering Modules
Implemented standard testing controls: clear instructions, time allocation, and academic integrity reminders.
Checked and recorded scores; performed item review on commonly missed questions for post-exam feedback.
(Final assessment was administered and checked; a small number of students required
make-up arrangements due to validated absences, handled per campus policy.)
Completed checking and consolidation of all lecture requirements (quizzes, activities, performance tasks, and final exam).
Computed final lecture grades following the syllabus grading components and verified entries in the class record.
Conducted consultation/feedback sessions and addressed student clarifications on scores and grading basis.
Administered final practical evaluation and checked laboratory outputs (inheritance-based mini-scenario/code submissions).
Validated code quality: correct use of constructors, inheritance/overriding, documentation, and basic debugging practices.
Archived final laboratory outputs and prepared evidence for completion of Semester 1 requirements.
1 was finalized: grades computed, records validated, and outputs archived
*Provide relevant documentation such as pictures, summary reports, etc.
